top_blocker_categories.suggestion: Tighten evidence contracts around exact commands, artifacts, and owned-surface coverage.
Move prohibited conditions into preflight and worker guardrails so acceptance is not the first detector.
Split critical work earlier so deferred closure does not survive into acceptance.
Make acceptor findings more structured so blocker classes can be routed earlier.
Turn fallback paths into explicit contract decisions instead of allowing silent implementation shortcuts.
Strengthen worker handoffs so unresolved assumptions are blocked before acceptance.
Require full source and materialized documentation context whenever remediation edits docs.

quality_expansion_points: First-pass acceptance is too low; strengthen worker handoff contracts and preflight checks.
Remediation is activating often; move recurring blocker classes into earlier route decisions.
Blocked final states are too frequent; escalate repeated blocker patterns sooner.
